SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.assertion.client.imap

Class ImapExternalClient

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.assertion.client.ExternalClient
com.mimecast.robin.assertion.client.MatchExternalClient
com.mimecast.robin.assertion.client.imap.ImapExternalClient
public class ImapExternalClient extends MatchExternalClient
IMAP external client for email verification assertions.

Connects to an IMAP server, fetches a message by Message-ID, and verifies its headers and/or body parts against configured patterns.

Supports optional cleanup after successful verification:

  • delete: true - Deletes the verified message after assertion.
  • purge: true - Purges all messages in the folder after assertion (takes precedence over delete).

Example configuration: 

 {
   type: "imap",
   host: "imap.example.com",
   port: 993,
   user: "test@example.com",
   pass: "secret",
   folder: "INBOX",
   delete: true,
   matches: {
     headers: [
       ["subject", "Test Email"]
     ],
     parts: [
       {
         headers: [["content-type", "text/plain"]],
         body: [["Hello, World"]]
       }
     ]
   }
 }

  • Method Details

    • getClient

      protected ImapClient getClient()
      Gets new ImapClient.
      Returns:
      ImapClient instance.

    • run

      public void run() throws AssertException
      Runs the IMAP client to fetch and verify message.
      Specified by:
      run in class ExternalClient
      Throws:
      AssertException - If verification fails or no email is found.

    • verifyMessage

      private boolean verifyMessage(jakarta.mail.Message message, ImapClient imapClient) throws AssertException
      Verifies the fetched message against expected criteria.
      Parameters:
      message - The email message to verify.
      imapClient - The IMAP client for part extraction.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating verification success.
      Throws:
      AssertException - If verification fails.

    • verifyHeaders

      private boolean verifyHeaders(jakarta.mail.Message message, List<List<String>> headerMatches) throws jakarta.mail.MessagingException, AssertException
      Verifies message headers against configured patterns.
      Parameters:
      message - The email message.
      headerMatches - List of header match pattern groups.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating verification success.
      Throws:
      jakarta.mail.MessagingException - If header extraction fails.
      AssertException - If pattern matching fails.

    • verifyParts

      private boolean verifyParts(jakarta.mail.Message message, ImapClient imapClient, List<Map<String,Object>> partSpecs) throws AssertException
      Verifies message MIME parts against configured patterns.

      Each part assertion can specify optional header patterns to target a specific MIME part, plus body patterns and hash values to match against the part's content.

      Parameters:
      message - The email message.
      imapClient - The IMAP client for part extraction.
      partSpecs - List of part specification maps.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating verification success.
      Throws:
      AssertException - If pattern matching fails.

    • findMatchingParts

      private List<ImapClient.PartDescriptor> findMatchingParts(List<ImapClient.PartDescriptor> parts, List<List<String>> headerPatterns)
      Finds parts that match all specified header patterns.
      Parameters:
      parts - List of all parts.
      headerPatterns - Header patterns to match (optional).
      Returns:
      List of matching parts.

    • verifyPartBody

      private boolean verifyPartBody(ImapClient.PartDescriptor part, List<List<String>> bodyPatterns)
      Verifies a part's body content against patterns.
      Parameters:
      part - The part to verify.
      bodyPatterns - Body patterns to match.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating if all patterns matched.

    • verifyPartHashes

      private boolean verifyPartHashes(ImapClient.PartDescriptor part, Map<String,String> hashAssertions)
      Verifies a part's content hashes against expected values.
      Parameters:
      part - The part to verify.
      hashAssertions - Map of hash type (sha1, sha256, md5) to expected value.
      Returns:
      Boolean indicating if all hashes matched.

    • compilePatterns

      private void compilePatterns(List<List<String>> headerMatches)
      Compiles header match patterns.
      Parameters:
      headerMatches - List of header match patterns.
